name: InZinc Mining Ltd.
description: InZinc Mining Ltd. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of base and precious metals projects in North America. The company is primarily focused on its 100% owned Indy project in central British Columbia, which features near-surface mineralization and extensive exploration targets along a 29 km trend. InZinc aims to discover and develop new mineral districts in mining-friendly jurisdictions, leveraging its experienced management team to deliver shareholder value through strategic exploration and development of its mineral assets.
